Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "GOTHIK-C000" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Gothik.prg"
Metadata.Notes: Note: As this game is actually frozen, the game starts at $BF37. However the true start address is $C000.
